SIMUS-Struct & Fixed matched-subspace detector & Best fixed downstream head on the prespecified held-out structural benchmark and on the same-residual MC--SVD ablation. & Tables~\ref{tab:accepted_v2_structural_main} and \ref{tab:simus_detector_family_ablation}. \\
One deployable head under mixed clutter burden & Adaptive detector & Matches the fixed head on cleaner residuals and only promotes clutter-heavy tiles to whitening when the guard statistic fires. & Same-residual SIMUS rows collapse to the fixed head; the same frozen rule is retained for harsher audits and real-IQ use. \\
SIMUS-Struct stress rows & Fully whitened specialist & Strongest on the cardiac rows and on the 64-frame and 48-frame short-ensemble rows; fixed remains strongest only on the hardest 32-frame row. & Tables~\ref{tab:simus_stress_frontier_headline} and \ref{tab:simus_stress_frontier_rpca_heads}. \\
